chat.placeholder: Ask me anything about the property or the area…

fallback.noInfo: I don't have that information. Reception can help — would you like me to notify them?
fallback.staffNotified: I've notified the team — they'll be in touch shortly.
fallback.outOfScope: I can help with questions about the property and local recommendations.

consent.title: About your data
consent.body: Your conversations are stored anonymously for 30 days so we can improve answers. We don't collect personal data.
